---
name: Plugin Request
about: Request a new plugin or importer
title: "[Plugin] "
labels: plugin
assignees: ''
---

**Plugin type**
- [ ] Importer (bring data in)
- [ ] Analysis (analyze existing knowledge)
- [ ] Action (do something with knowledge)
- [ ] Export (send knowledge out)
- [ ] AI Enhancement (AI-powered feature)

**Description**
What should this plugin do?

**Data source / format**
If an importer, what service or file format?

**Use case**
How would you use this in practice?
